name: Lettuce Wedges with Avacado Dressing
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut avocado lengthwise in half; remove pit.
2. Scoop out the flesh and mash it.
3. Stir in sour cream, lemon juice, onion salt, and Worcestershire sauce.
4. Mash the cheese with a fork; stir in oil, wine, and vinegar.
5. Mix the dressing with the mashed avocado mixture.
6. Cover and refrigerate until chilled, at least 2 hours.
7. Serve over lettuce wedges.
